---

<div align="center">
  <h2>🚀 Featured Engineering</h2>
</div>

> ### Full Stack & AI Developer | AgriCart Farmtech Private Limited
> **Problem:** Indian farmers and enterprises lacked a dedicated platform and intelligent support.
> **Solution:** Built and maintained a Magento-based frontend for a B2B2C e-commerce startup. Fine-tuned LLMs on agriculture datasets to build an AI-powered chatbot. Collected and cleaned domain-specific data for model training.
> **Tech:** Frontend Dev, LLM Fine-Tuning, Data Processing

> ### Blockchain Developer | Deloitte (Capstone Program)
> **Problem:** Supply chains required greater transparency and traceability.
> **Solution:** Designed a blockchain-powered audit trail system. Implemented smart contracts and immutable ledger systems to establish trust and track assets securely.
> **Tech:** Blockchain, Smart Contracts, Distributed Ledgers

> ### Predicting Power Outages in Delhi
> **Problem:** Need for optimized grid management and outage forecasting.
> **Solution:** Forecasted potential power failures using historical weather data and network topology analysis to assist grid optimization.
> **Tech:** Data Analysis, Predictive Modeling
